title: CRISIS AND SUPPORT LINE - 211info
text: CENTER AGAINST RAPE AND DOMESTIC VIOLENCE CRISIS AND SUPPORT LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 24-hour crisis line that includes information and referrals to community resources, one-on-one peer support, and safety planning. 2208 SW 3rd Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Live Chat: Monday-Friday 10am-1pm Email (541) 754-0110 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 754-0110 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Digital Translation, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corvallis Transit Route bus line 6 stops directly in front, off 3rd Street Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Sexual Assault Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - EDUCATING TO END VIOLENCE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DOMESTIC VIOLENCE & SEXUAL ASSAULT SERVICES MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER AGAINST RAPE AND DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
